title: Independent Widgets for Project Dashboards In Portfolio
excerpt: Recently I’ve been editing the dashboards for the projects in my Portfolio board and I noticed that some of the widgets carry over the same settings or information on all of the dashboards.  One example,  if I use a text…

posts.author: oscarxquiles (Oscar Quiles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Recently I’ve been editing the dashboards for the projects in my Portfolio board and I noticed that some of the widgets carry over the same settings or information on all of the dashboards. One example, if I use a text widget on Project A and then go to Project B, the text widget on that will have the exact same text.

Ideally, when you open the dashboard of each project in a portfolio, each one would be independent, so we could have all projects summarized directly in the dashboard. For example, we were thinking of having each dashboard contain a text widget with the Purpose of the corresponding project, a Timeline widget with the corresponding project milestones and so on. We wanted a central info hub for all of our program’s projects and the Portfolio is great for that, but with these limitations, we still depend on having to go to the project boards themselves.
